name: Financial Impact Dashboard
description: Dollar value of blocked fraud, estimated net savings vs false positive costs, and monthly blocked trend.

cards.name: Blocked Fraud Value (30d)
cards.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0.0) AS blocked_amount_usd FROM predictions WHERE is_flagged = true AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

cards.name: Net Savings vs FP Cost (30d)
cards.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged = true AND fraud_probability >= 0.90 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0.0) - COUNT(CASE WHEN is_flagged = true AND fraud_probability < 0.90 THEN 1 END) * 50.0 AS net_savings_usd FROM predictions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

cards.name: Monthly Blocked Value Trend
cards.query: SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at) AS month, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0.0) AS blocked_amount_usd FROM predictions WHERE is_flagged = true GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
